observation: Creator capsule routes now cover static surfaces, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, social card, and p5 creative-coding probes, but creators still need a safe explainer-scene handoff for Manim-style educational motion before any renderer dependency or MP4 output enters the repo.
population: creator capsule frontier-adapter mutations for externally-rendered visual workflows
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into an executable renderer handoff faster while preserving memory, proof, public boundary, and minimal DASH core size

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a checked Manim scene contract and generated ignored Python Scene stub before external rendering.
candidates.phenotype: JSON Manim adapter contract plus fixed-canvas proof card and generated .artifacts/creator-manim-scene.py stub
candidates.risk: Could become a fake renderer workflow if it only shows a board and does not generate a real scene stub, or could bloat the core if Manim is added as a dependency.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a Remotion composition shot list and frame probe contract before React renderer work.
candidates.phenotype: JSON shot list plus fixed-canvas frame map, with Remotion runtime kept outside the core
candidates.risk: Needs a stronger React/runtime boundary before it is safe to retain without dragging app dependencies into the repo.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a TouchDesigner/twozero tox handoff note with port and local-operator safety checks.
candidates.phenotype: Adapter note and fixed proof card, pending a live local TouchDesigner contract
candidates.risk: Without a live TD smoke contract, it can only document a future bridge and may overstate execution.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a browser demo surface with screenshot QA and rollback notes.
candidates.phenotype: Single HTML demo plus browser proof and deploy checklist
candidates.risk: Can become another static board unless it has a real deploy or interaction path.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a small printable PDF zine for creator process notes.
candidates.phenotype: Multi-panel HTML/PDF proof using existing print path
candidates.risk: May duplicate the poster and one-pager paths unless a distinct remix job is proven.

retention: Retain creator-manim-scene-route as the public-safe bridge from capsule memory to an external Manim scene handoff: JSON contract, generated ignored Python stub, fixed-canvas proof card, and machine gate. Keep older winners in retained_routes so the active candidate list can stay focused on 3-5 current mutations without losing regression coverage.
